description: Portfolio management page with holdings tracking, real-time P&L, asset summary, and Augur analysis integration
steps: Create dashboard/templates/portfolio.html extending base.html with Bloomberg dark theme styles. Include: (1) Add holding form with fields: ticker, buy price, quantity, buy date. (2) Holdings table showing: ticker, cost basis, current price (fetched from /api/fetch/{ticker}), P&L amount, P&L percentage, holding days. (3) Total asset summary section: total invested, current total value, total P&L, total return rate. (4) All data persisted in localStorage as JSON array. (5) 'Run Augur Analysis' button that calls /api/analyze/{ticker} for each holding and displays master scores.
Add /portfolio route in dashboard/app.py returning portfolio.html template, following the pattern of other page routes (e.g., watchlist_page).
Add Portfolio nav item in dashboard/templates/base.html sidebar under the 'Analysis' group, between watchlist and backtest. Use a wallet/briefcase SVG icon. Also add to bottom-nav for mobile.

Add earnings tracking chart section in portfolio.html: (a) SVG-based portfolio value line chart showing 7-day weighted net value curve using /api/sparkline/{ticker} data for each holding. Pure SVG/Canvas, no external libraries. (b) Asset allocation pie chart using SVG circle + stroke-dasharray for a donut/ring chart showing each holding's weight in the portfolio.
Ensure the page has table sorting functionality (click column headers to sort ascending/descending) using pure JS.
acceptance_criteria: /portfolio route returns 200 with proper HTML page
Portfolio nav item appears in sidebar and mobile bottom-nav
Holdings can be added/removed via localStorage
Holdings table shows all required columns including real-time price fetch
Run Augur Analysis button triggers analysis for each holding
SVG line chart renders weighted portfolio value curve
SVG donut chart renders asset allocation
Table columns are sortable by clicking headers
verification: Start server with python -m dashboard.app and verify /portfolio returns 200
